emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 07/24/00

emails.subject: EOL Credit Responses 07/24/00
emails.body: Leslie, On the attached list they have PPL Electric Utilties Corporation PPL Energy Plus as amended and new, but you didn't respond to them. I have no record on PPL Electric Utilities, so can you treat that as a new counterparty even though it says amended. Thanks. Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 07/27/2000 09:00 AM Tom Moran 07/24/2000 06:04 PM

emails.subject: EOL Credit Responses 07/24/00

emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 07/24/00
emails.body: Re: EOL Credit Responses 07/24/00 Tana: I didn't respond because these CPs are okay to trade US power. Although I sometime add comments at the bottom of my e-mails re CPs that are authorized to trade (for my notes more than anything and for Rhonda), if I respond to a particular list and don't comment on a CP, you can assume that they are okay to trade US power. Leslie Tana Jones 07/27/2000 09:02 AM
